name: orchard-sign
description: Code signing diagnostics and automation for Apple developers. 22 error patterns covering certificates, profiles, entitlements, and Xcode configuration.

tools.name: sign_diagnose
tools.description: Diagnose code signing errors from xcodebuild output.

tools.name: sign_health
tools.description: Full signing health check for certs, profiles, and Xcode.

tools.name: sign_profiles
tools.description: List all provisioning profiles with expiry status.

tools.name: sign_fix
tools.description: Get step-by-step fix for a specific signing problem.
